series_metadata.series_description: ephemeral materials produced for marketing or registration purposes; also includes annual financial summary reports solely created for public distribution (e.g., Annual Comprehensive Financial Report [ACFR])
reference copies of newspaper, magazine, and other media clippings concerning the agency, agency officials, and other topics of interest

retention_rules.disposition: RETAIN UNTIL: Reference value ends ± THEN: Destroy Agency Policy: _______________

series_metadata.series_description: record copies of agency materials published in print or online

retention_rules.disposition: Transfer to State Publications Clearinghouse, State Library of North Carolina: a) Publications for sale: 5 copies b) Free publications (printed): 2 print copies AND an electronic copy, or 10 print copies c) Free publications (no print run): 1 electronic copy

series_metadata.series_description: surplus copies of agency printed materials
correspondence and other related records regarding the design and creation of agency publications SEE ALSO: Contracts (LEGAL)

retention_rules.disposition: RETAIN UNTIL: Complete PLUS: 5 years THEN: Destroy*

series_metadata.series_description: social media sites and other websites that have historical content or have been identified for long-term retention for the purposes of institutional memory and planning; also includes comments and private messaging SEE ALSO: Reference Files (AGENCY MANAGEMENT); (below); (below); (below); (below) AdvertisementsAudio-Visual MaterialsPress ReleasesAnnouncements SEE ALSO: Web Management and Operations Records (INFORMATION TECHNOLOGY)

tracking_data.comments: Electronic records will transfer immediately to the custody of the Archives.

series_metadata.series_description: social media sites and other websites containing routine content; also includes comments and private messaging SEE ALSO: Reference Files (AGENCY MANAGEMENT); (below); (below); (below); (below) AdvertisementsAudio-Visual MaterialsPress ReleasesAnnouncements SEE ALSO: Web Management and Operations Records (INFORMATION TECHNOLOGY)

retention_rules.disposition: RETAIN UNTIL: Posted/Received PLUS: 5 years THEN: Destroy

series_metadata.series_description: other related records produced in planning and executing agency’s online presence SEE ALSO: Reference Files (AGENCY MANAGEMENT); (below); (below); (below); (below) AdvertisementsAudio-Visual MaterialsPress ReleasesAnnouncements SEE ALSO: Web Management and Operations Records (INFORMATION TECHNOLOGY)
records concerning significant awards by the agency recognizing community contributions

tracking_data.comments: Transfer to the State Records Center when reference value ends for immediate transfer to the custody of the Archives.

series_metadata.series_description: records concerning routine awards by the agency recognizing community contributions

retention_rules.disposition: RETAIN UNTIL: Complete PLUS: 5 years THEN: Destroy

series_metadata.series_description: records concerning positive comments as well as objections, dissatisfaction, or disagreements with actions or positions taken or not taken by the agency; includes petitions signed by constituents requesting action SEE ALSO: Complaints (HUMAN RESOURCES); Petitions, Rule Making Proceedings (GOVERNANCE); Improper Conduct Investigations, Investigation and Hearing Records (MONITORING AND COMPLIANCE)

retention_rules.disposition: RETAIN UNTIL: Closed PLUS: 1 year THEN: Destroy*

series_metadata.series_description: includes requests for service or information (RFI)

retention_rules.disposition: RETAIN UNTIL: Closed PLUS: 1 year THEN: Destroy*

series_metadata.series_description: surveys distributed to and collected from constituents addressing agency services, policies, and other concerns SEE ALSO: Reporting (AGENCY MANAGEMENT)

retention_rules.disposition: RETAIN UNTIL: Reference value ends ± THEN: Destroy Agency Policy: ________________

series_metadata.series_description: minutes and/or transcripts of hearings SEE ALSO: Agency Hearings (LEGAL), Rule Making Proceedings (GOVERNANCE)
agendas, notices, speaker sign-up sheets, and other related records SEE ALSO: Agency Hearings (LEGAL), Rule Making Proceedings (GOVERNANCE)

retention_rules.disposition: RETAIN UNTIL: Complete PLUS: 1 year THEN: Destroy*

series_metadata.series_description: requests submitted by persons seeking access to agency records and documentation of agency response NOTE: These disposition instructions apply only to the request, internal agency records related to searching for and preparing responsive records, and communication of response; the documents that are responsive to public records requests should be handled according to their respective disposition instructions (e.g., speaker sign-up sheets from a public hearing can be destroyed after 1 year; publications management materials can be destroyed after 5 years). However, if the agency also retains separate copies of the documents that are responsive to public records requests, they may also be destroyed 2 years after completion of the request SEE ALSO: Accounts Receivable (FINANCIAL MANAGEMENT)

retention_rules.disposition: RETAIN UNTIL: Complete PLUS: 2 years THEN: Destroy*

series_metadata.series_description: copies of acknowledgements sent to donors

retention_rules.disposition: RETAIN UNTIL: Complete PLUS: 1 year THEN: Destroy

series_metadata.series_description: contact information for individuals and organizations that have expressed an interest in supporting agency activities

records documenting the organization and promotion of fund drives and other special events in which the agency participated for the purpose of fundraising; includes records concerning solicitations requesting and donations providing money or in-kind donations for agency programs SEE ALSO: Accounts Receivable (FINANCIAL MANAGEMENT)

retention_rules.disposition: RETAIN UNTIL: Complete PLUS: 1 year THEN: Destroy

routine print or online ads that promote agency initiatives or publicize agency activities
images, recordings, and films produced by or for the agency that have historical significance SEE ALSO: Governing and Advisory Body Minutes (GOVERNANCE), Workplace Security Records (RISK MANAGEMENT)
